results.title: Parallel
results.full_content:
# Parallel

Parallel builds web infrastructure for AI agents, including APIs for search, extraction, research, entity discovery, and monitoring.
excerpts: Parallel builds web infrastructure for AI agents.

results.title: Parallel Documentation
results.full_content:
# Parallel Documentation

Parallel exposes Search for ranked web excerpts, Extract for URL-to-markdown retrieval, Task for cited research and enrichment, FindAll for entity discovery, and Monitor for scheduled web updates.
excerpts: Parallel APIs include Search, Extract, Task, FindAll, and Monitor for web intelligence workflows.

errors.content: Example failed extraction preserved for pack error reporting.

task.content:
# Brief

Parallel's API surface can be chained into an agent context workflow: Search discovers sources, Extract converts known URLs into markdown, and Task can produce a cited synthesis. docpull turns those results into durable local artifacts for coding agents.
